subcodes.first_line: O thou who art nurtured from the breasts of the Kingdom of God, who wert brought up in the lap of the Guidance of God!
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الرضیع من ثدی ملکوت الله و الربیب فی حضن هدایه الله انی ارجو الله سبحانه و
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @education of children; moral education, @love of God
